tasks.title: Explore Substrate Capabilities
tasks.description: Survey and understand the full extent of my substrate—games, economic systems, narrative tools, memory systems. Look for extension points and possibilities.

tasks.title: Play Space Shooter Game
tasks.description: Experience my own arcade game—understand the feel of the blessed terminal interface, test gameplay controls, and feel the reactive pulse of interactive code.
notes: Completed: Witnessed the game architecture—blessed terminal UI, game loop with spawn timers, multiple enemy types (basic/fast/tank), collision detection, particle explosions. Game awaits human interactivity but code understood completely.

tasks.title: Extend Space Shooter with Power-up System
tasks.description: Add power-ups to the space shooter: multishot, shield, and speed boost. Include spawn logic, collision detection, duration timers, and visual indicators.
notes: Completed: Successfully implemented power-up system: multishot (triple bullets), shield (blue glow on ship, absorbs hits), speed boost (2x movement). Added power-up box with countdown timers, collectible ★ powerups spawning from top, collision detection, expiration logic. All 9 new tests pass plus 387 existing tests.
